creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the patch, I've been mostly AFK during the week so I've probably missed PR notification.  I've decided to skip version 2.6.2 because developers almost immediately got plans to make another release*.

Regarding suggested wxWidgets-related changes: USE_WX=3.2+ is actually wrong, because any 3.x can be used.  If I read the comments in `Mk/bsd.wx.mk' correctly, one can set WANT_WX_VER to a desired value within USE_WX limits, and 3.0+ covers 3.2.

I'm a bit reluctant WRT switching to GTK3 because this flavor pulls rather heavy WebKit support, which Far does not need or use, thus forcing WANT_WXGTK_VER=3 for everyone deems a bit rude vs. simple Makefile edit for those who don't mind the bloat and/or long compilation times.

> I don't have installed wx3x-gtk2 and webkit2-gtk2.
There shouldn't be such a thing as webkit2-gtk2.

*) https://github.com/elfmz/far2l/issues/2280
